basic_details.job_title: Berhampur University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 95 Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Berhampur University, Bhanja Bihar, Berhampur - 760007 (Ganjam) Odisha
basic_details.department: PG Departments and Lingaraj Law College, Berhampur University
basic_details.short_information: Berhampur University (BU) Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor has been released on 28 April 2026 on the official website www.buodisha.edu.in. A total of 95 vacancies have been announced through the BU Faculty Recruitment 2026 across various PG Departments and Lingaraj Law College. Candidates below 60 years who have essential qualifications as per UGC Regulations (Master’s/Ph.D./NET/SLET/SET as applicable) are eligible to apply for these teaching vacancies. The online application process for BU Faculty Recruitment 2026 has started on

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on University website

application_fee.details: The application fee is non-refundable and must be paid online as per the bank details given in the online portal (HIMS). Candidates applying for more than one post will have to apply separately for each post and pay application fee for each post. Applications without applicable fee will be summarily rejected. | Important Notes on Application Fee: | No fee is required for SC/ST and Women candidates Fee must be paid online only Fee is non-refundable Separate fee for each post if applying for multiple posts

age_limit.maximum_age: Below 60 Years (Candidates above 60 years not eligible)
age_limit.details: Candidates above 60 years will not be eligible to apply. The superannuation age is presently 60 years as per Higher Education Department, Government of Odisha norms. Only matriculation/SSC certificate/pass certificate issued by the concerned educational board will be considered as proof of date of birth.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application submission (10-06-2026, Midnight). The educational qualification must be from a recognized University established under Central Act, Provincial Act, State Act or an Institution recognized by the UGC. Qualifications and selections are as per UGC Regulations Notification No. F.1-2/2017(EC/PS), 18th July 2018 and as amended from time to time. Candidates above 60 years are not eligible to apply. | Essential Qualification for Professor (Pay Level-14 as per 7th CPC) | Eligibility (A or B): | Option A: | An eminent scholar having a Ph.D. degree in the concerned/allied/relevant discipline and published work of high quality, actively engaged in research with evidence of published work with minimum of 10 research publications in peer-reviewed or UGC-listed journals and a total research score of 120 as per the criteria given in Appendix II, Table 2 of UGC Regulation No. F.1-2/2017(EC/PS), 18th July 2018 A minimum of ten years of teaching experience in university/college as Assistant Professor/Associate Professor/Professor, and/or research experience at equivalent level at the University/National Level Institutions with evidence of having successfully guided doctoral candidate | Option B: | An outstanding professional, having a Ph.D. degree in the relevant/allied/applied disciplines, from any academic institutions (not included in A above) / industry, who has made significant contribution to the knowledge in the concerned/allied/relevant discipline, supported by documentary evidence provided he/she has ten years' experience | Essential Qualification for Associate Professor (Pay Level-13A as per 7th CPC) | A good academic record, with a Ph.D. Degree in the concerned/allied/relevant disciplines A Master's Degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point scale wherever grading system is followed) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University or an equivalent degree from foreign University For SC/ST/Non-Creamy layer OBC/Differently abled candidates, the requirement at master level is 50%. Relaxation of 5% in marks is also applicable to Ph.D. degree holder who completed master degree prior to 19 September, 1991 A minimum of eight years of experience of teaching and/or research in an academic/research position equivalent to that of Assistant Professor in a University, College or Accredited Research Institution/industry with minimum of seven publications in peer-reviewed or UGC-listed journals and a total research score of Seventy-five (75) as per the criteria given in Appendix II, Table 2 of UGC Regulation No. F.1-2/2017(EC/PS), 18th July 2018 | Essential Qualification for Assistant Professor (Pay Level-10 as per 7th CPC) | Eligibility (A or B): | Option A: | A Master's Degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point scale wherever grading system is followed) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University or an equivalent degree from foreign University For SC/ST/Non-Creamy layer OBC/Differently abled candidates, the requirement at master level is 50%. Relaxation of 5% in marks is also applicable to Ph.D. degree holder who completed master degree prior to 19 September, 1991 Must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR or a similar test accredited by the UGC like SLET/SET Candidates who are or have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 and their amendments are exempted from NET/SLET/SET As per UGC Notification dated 30th June 2023: "NET/SET/SLET shall be the minimum criteria for the direct recruitment to the post of Assistant Professor for all Higher Education Institution" | Option B: | The Ph.D degree has been obtained from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among top 500 in the World University Ranking (at any time) by any one of the following: (i) Quacquarelli Symonds (QS) (ii) the Times Higher Education (THE) or (iii) the Academic Ranking of World Universities (ARWU) of the Shanghai Jiao Tong University (Shanghai)

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: Pay Level-14 (7th CPC), Associate Professor: Pay Level-13A (7th CPC), Assistant Professor: Pay Level-10 (7th CPC)
salary_details.details: Pay and other allowances applicable to the faculty members will be admissible as sanctioned by the Government of Odisha from time to time. The pay structure is as per the 7th Central Pay Commission and approved by Government of Odisha. Appointment to the posts will be made as per the University Act and Statute.

selection_process: Slide 2 Subject domain strength (core strength and name of subjects/specialization)
Slide 3 Practical skill / experience that make you unique
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the HIMS Portal (https://hims.odisha.gov.in/) which will be available from 07.05.2026 onwards. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 07-05-2026 to 10-06-2026 (Midnight). In addition to online submission, a hard copy of the downloaded submitted application along with all relevant documents must be sent via Speed Post to reach the Registrar on or before 20.06.2026.
Step 1: Visit HIMS Portal - Go to https://hims.odisha.gov.in/ (portal available from 07.05.2026)
Step 2: Register/Login - Create account or login if already registered
important_instructions: Eligibility of a candidate and satisfaction of any other short-listing criteria shall be considered as on closing date of submission of online application (10.06.2026 Midnight) Only matriculation/SSC certificate/pass certificate issued by the concerned educational board will be considered as proof of date of birth. No other document will be accepted Candidates above 60 years will not be eligible to apply Exchange of reservation is not permitted The period spent by candidates to acquire M.Phil. and/or Ph.D. degree shall not be considered as research experience As per UGC communication dated 1 March 2016, a certificate from the employer/head of Institution/University mentioning that the period of active service spent on pursuing Research Degree (Ph.D.) simultaneously without taking any leave may be counted as teaching experience for Associate Professor and above If more than one application is submitted by the candidate for the same post, only the application submitted later within the last date of submission shall be considered. Application in part is not acceptable Incomplete application form in any respect and/or not in the prescribed proforma or/and without required documents will not be entertained and will be rejected without assigning any reason Application without signature will not be considered and rejected without refund of application processing fee No TA/DA shall be paid to the candidates for attending the interview Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification The prescribed qualifications and experience are minimum and mere possessing the same does not entitle the candidate to be called for interview. The University will have the right to restrict and shortlist most suitable candidates The University reserves the right not to fill up any or some of the vacancies advertised without assigning any reason The University reserves the right to revise/reschedule/cancel/suspend the advertisement/recruitment process without assigning any reason In case of any inadvertent mistake in the process of selection, which might be detected at any stage even after issue of appointment letter, the University reserves the right to modify/withdraw/cancel any communication made to the candidate(s) While applying, the applicant should ensure that he/she fulfils the eligibility and other conditions/norms. In case it is detected at any stage that the candidate has furnished incorrect/false information or suppressed facts, the appointment/service will be terminated No request for change of post(s) and update of new information in the application form will be entertained after the last date of application In cases of any disputes, any suits or legal proceedings against the University, the jurisdiction shall be restricted to the Courts in Berhampur, Odisha which is the headquarters of the University Any change or amendment in this advertisement shall be displayed on the University website only. Candidates are advised to visit University website regularly and remain updated For references, UGC NORMS (wherever applicable and as amended from time to time) may be downloaded from UGC websites Candidates are advised to visit the website www.buodisha.edu.in regularly for updated information regarding eligible/ineligible list, interview schedule, results, and other notifications
